original: spring blade

The tarratch slaver stands about 5' 10\" and is dressed in sleek purple armor that clings to their willowy, graceful form. She has an eerie, elfin, androgynous attractiveness from which it is impossible to tell their sex. Only the football-sized insect abdomen that hangs over her ass is there to tell you she’s female.\n\nShe is helmetless, black hair and pupil-less eyes bared to the air, which is presumably so her ruff of moth-like feathers can flutter freely. They buzz and shimmer with strange colors that seem to dip in and out of existence, constantly disintegrating and reforming into unsettling patterns. She moves with a light-footed grace which makes her seem she’s just on the edge of bursting into flight.

They buzz and shimmer with strange colors that seem to dip in and out of existence, constantly disintegrating and reforming into unsettling patterns. He moves with a light-footed grace which makes him seem he’s just on the edge of bursting into flight.

“Look inside,” [enemy.heShe] entreats. “Stop this needless violence and see forever, rue collar. It is all inconsequential once you truly see...” It really is very difficult to concentrate with that fan of horribly fascinating colors fluttering away in the background.

“Give in,” [enemy.heShe] intones when your eyes reluctantly meet [enemy.hisHer] own black orbs. “Let all those wonderful, succulent thoughts I can sense within you rise to the front of your mind. Doesn’t it feel good when you look? How can you truly look if you don’t put a stop to this ugly, meaningless struggle?”
With a will of iron, you grit your teeth and keep your eyes firmly on the tarratch in front of [enemy.himHer].

As much as you want to deny it, [enemy.heShe]’s right – it feels like you can think more, enjoy everything more when you look directly into that fan, like some iridescent, infinite flower with a pale center, heat rising to your [pc.skin]. And every time you look, you think you see something new - a new sensation uncurling in your mind, making it more and more difficult to look away...
You feint and fling yourself to one side, the sucking gasp of the grenade’s airburst tingling your skin as it detonates harmlessly behind you.

Despite your best efforts to dodge it, the grenade bats against your [pc.hasUpperGarment|[pc.skin]|[pc.upperGarments]] and detonates with a deafening gasp of air. It feels like someone just gave you an open-palmed smack across the whole of your body; you are left feeling drained and prickly with static.

as liquid lust sinks its fingers into you. It’s not just pure arousal, you woozily realize; as you struggle to stay focused on the battle, you feel your mind unfurling and your pupils dilating, your thoughts coming slower, catching and dragging on every piece of sensory input your body is taking in. The tarratch grins slyly at you, ruff fluttering.
“You shouldn’t have come here, rue collar,” [enemy.heShe] says softly.
